powerpagecomponent.name: Edit Registration
powerpagecomponent.searchcontent:
Edit Registration{% assign id_param = request.params["id"] %} {% fetchxml events %} {% endfetchxml %} {% fetchxml userRegistrationDetails %} {% endfetchxml %}

Edit Event Registration

{% if id_param and userRegistrationDetails.results.entities.size > 0 %} {% assign userRegistration = userRegistrationDetails.results.entities[0] %}
1{{userRegistration.er_event.value}}2{{userRegistration.er_event.Value}}3{{userRegistration.er_event.label}}4{{userRegistration.er_event.id}}
{% else %}
Registration record not found.
Please check the link or your permissions.
{% endif %}
{% include "WebAPI Wrapper" %} Edit Registration
